title: pachyloma coriaceum
intro: Pachyloma coriaceum is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae, commonly known as the rough-leaved pachyloma. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Pachyloma coriaceum include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and treat respiratory infections, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Pachyloma coriaceum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is required to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
